race.comment: DONATELLO (2) closed off strongly at his second Australian start when he jumped sharply in grade for a narrow fifth over 1800m at Randwick in BM72 class. Can race a touch closer in this weaker contest and prove hard to hold out. SCOOP THE POOL (3) just under a month between runs when he gripped on late to run second over 1850m at Newcastle on a soft (7) track. Will hold a forward position and figure prominently. MASTER OF WAR (1) is mixing his form on the country tracks and indicated he was near his best with a game third over 1600m at Nowra. Finds a suitable race and can build on that solid recent effort. CHAITHNIA (7) raced a touch closer from the low draw and was very plain in the straight with a below-par sixth over 1850m at Newcastle. Winkers go on with the key jockey change. Worth another chance.
